items.title: SEC makes huge U-turn, declares crypto tokens are ‘digital commodities’ after years of legal battles
items.whyYouShouldCare: The SEC's classification of crypto tokens as 'digital commodities' could enhance regulatory clarity, potentially benefiting Solana's ecosystem and attracting institutional interest.

items.title: State of Rango Q4 2025
items.whyYouShouldCare: Rango's Q4 2025 report highlights infrastructure developments that could improve Solana's interoperability and user experience, fostering greater adoption within its ecosystem.

items.title: Solana’s stablecoin surge meets rising OI – Can SOL’s price push higher?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The increase in stablecoin activity alongside rising open interest suggests a bullish sentiment for SOL, indicating potential upward price movement and increased liquidity.
